setup: cd apps/frontman_server && mix local.hex --force && mix local.rebar --force && mix deps.get

processes.name: rescript
processes.command: rm -f lib/bs/.compiler.log && make clean && make rescript-build && make rescript-watch

processes.name: server
processes.command: while [ ! -f lib/bs/.compiler.log ] || ! tail -1 lib/bs/.compiler.log 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^#Done'; do sleep 1; done && while ! pg_isready -h localhost -U postgres 2>/dev/null; do sleep 2; done && cd apps/frontman_server && make dev-container

processes.name: client
processes.command: while [ ! -f lib/bs/.compiler.log ] || ! tail -1 lib/bs/.compiler.log 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^#Done'; do sleep 1; done && make dev-client

processes.name: nextjs-bundle
processes.command: while [ ! -f lib/bs/.compiler.log ] || ! tail -1 lib/bs/.compiler.log 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^#Done'; do sleep 1; done && cd libs/frontman-nextjs && yarn tsup --watch

processes.name: astro-bundle
processes.command: while [ ! -f lib/bs/.compiler.log ] || ! tail -1 lib/bs/.compiler.log 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^#Done'; do sleep 1; done && cd libs/frontman-astro && yarn tsup --watch

processes.name: nextjs
processes.command: while [ ! -f lib/bs/.compiler.log ] || ! tail -1 lib/bs/.compiler.log 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^#Done'; do sleep 1; done && while [ ! -f libs/frontman-nextjs/dist/index.js ]; do sleep 1; done && make dev-nextjs

processes.name: marketing
processes.command: while [ ! -f lib/bs/.compiler.log ] || ! tail -1 lib/bs/.compiler.log 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^#Done'; do sleep 1; done && while [ ! -f libs/frontman-astro/dist/integration.js ]; do sleep 1; done && cd apps/marketing && yarn dev --host 0.0.0.0

notes: This manifest is intentionally dogfood-specific and disposable.
CodeSandbox host/origin env vars are pending until SDK port URL behavior is observed.
Git push is intentionally excluded from runtime-first validation.
